name: hero-section
title: Hero Section
author: Parable
description: A complete marketing hero block — mono uppercase eyebrow, tracking-tight headline with one gradient-accented word, subcopy, primary/secondary CTA pair, and a mono stats row — that spring-staggers in on mount over two blurred radial glows drifting on slow keyframe orbits; under prefers-reduced-motion the content reveals instantly with no stagger and the glows hold a static frame.
